questionHtml: Using a demand and supply of money diagram, explain the likely effect on interest rates of a reduction in the minimum reserve requirement for banks (Text C, paragraph [1]).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who incorrectly label diagrams can be awarded a maximum of [3].

For a money demand and supply diagram, the vertical axis should be labelled interest rate, i, ir or r. The horizontal axis may be labelled Quantity (Q) or Q of Money. A title is not necessary.

meta.title: Using a demand and supply of money diagram, explain the likely effect on interest rates of a reduction in the minimum reserve requirement for banks (Text C, paragraph [1]).
breadcrumbLabels: 3.5.5 Demand and supply of money—determination of equilibrium interest rates
